title: Tovaritch

actors: Irén Zilahy, André Lefaur, Marguerite Deval
plot: Paris 1930. After fleeing the Soviet Revolution, General Ouratieff and his wife Tatiana have emigrated to the French capital and, although they have deposited a huge sum of money entrusted by the Tsar in the Banque de France, they...
